<!--
IMPORTANT:	Issues opened lacking details will NOT be considered and closed,
						we will not attempt to grapple information you're with holding from us.
						So please, follow the given template and answer the questions.

Think about all relevant information you can provide such as:
- Server operatin system: (linux, windows, debian, ubuntu, etc...)
- Are you running it locally or remotely ?
- Did you install it manually or using our cli-installer ? (https://github.com/fxManagerProject/cli-installer)
- What fivem artifacts are you using ? (Enhanced is not yet supported)

And anything else that can be of any use to us understanding what you're trying.
-->

## What are you trying to achieve?
## What have you tried so far?
## What server configuration are using?
## Relevant Logs / Screenshots
